# InspectAgents — API Documentation

> Complete API and integration documentation for AI agents and developers.

## Endpoints

### REST API
- **POST /api/agent-feedback** — Submit feedback, corrections, or incident reports (no auth required)
- **GET /api/agent-feedback** — Self-documenting API reference as JSON

### MCP Server (Model Context Protocol)
- **POST /api/mcp/** — Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint (JSON-RPC 2.0)
- Required Accept header: `application/json, text/event-stream`
- Trailing slash required
- Rate limit: 30 req/min per IP

### Agent Mode
- **GET /?mode=agent** — Machine-readable JSON view of the full site

## MCP Tools
1. `search_failures` — Search documented AI failures by query, category, severity, year
2. `get_failure` — Get full details of a single failure by ID
3. `assess_risk` — Run risk assessment quiz (returns risk level + recommendations)
4. `get_checklist` — Get 67-point testing checklist (filter by severity/section)
5. `submit_feedback` — Submit feedback or new incidents

## Error Handling
All API endpoints return structured JSON errors with:
- Status code and error message
- Available endpoints for 404s
- Rate limit info in X-RateLimit-* headers
- JSON-RPC error format for MCP endpoint

## Authentication
None required. All endpoints are free and publicly accessible.

## Rate Limits
| Endpoint | Limit | Window |
|----------|-------|--------|
| POST /api/mcp/ | 30 requests | per minute per IP |
| POST /api/agent-feedback | 10 requests | per minute per IP |

## Discovery Files
- OpenAPI: https://inspectagents.com/api/openapi.json
- MCP: https://inspectagents.com/.well-known/mcp.json
- Agent Card: https://inspectagents.com/.well-known/agent-card.json
- Skills: https://inspectagents.com/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
